question: How many people did the Framingham Heart Study originally enroll?

sources.title: Framingham Heart Study — Overview
sources.text: The Framingham Heart Study began in 1948 by recruiting an original cohort of 5,209 men and women between the ages of 30 and 62 from the town of Framingham, Massachusetts.

mock.claim: The Framingham Heart Study originally enrolled 5,209 participants.
mock.output: The Framingham Heart Study originally enrolled 5,209 men and women from Framingham, Massachusetts, beginning in 1948 [S1].
